sense.definition: a gambling game in which a ball is thrown into a spinning wheel with numbered holes and the players bet on the number that the ball will eventually fall into
a gambling game of cards in which each player needs to accumulate cards with exactly 21 points in order to win
a betting game typically played with dice or cards, where players predict whether the outcome will be high or low

examples.x: We played a game of high-low while waiting for our food to arrive.
I love to play high-low with a deck of cards when I’m with friends.
Have you ever tried high-low?
The dealer asked if we wanted to play high-low before the main game started.
He won the round of high-low because he kept guessing the cards correctly.

sense.definition: a casino game that combines elements of traditional poker and slot machines, allowing players to form poker hands and receive payouts based on their hand's rank

examples.x: I tried video poker for the first time last night, but I didn’t win anything.
After a few hours of video poker, I realized I needed to take a break.
She prefers video poker over traditional slots because it involves more strategy.
Video poker is one of the most popular games at casinos because it’s easy to understand.
I spent the afternoon playing video poker at the casino and ended up winning a bit.

sense.definition: a traditional Chinese gambling game played with a set of Chinese dominoes, typically involving four players
a Chinese gambling game played with a set of Chinese dominoes, where players form two hands, one high and one low, and compete against the banker's hands

examples.x: We decided to play pai gow at the casino last weekend.
She was teaching me how to play pai gow, but I kept getting confused by the tile combinations.
I had never heard of pai gow until my cousin introduced me to it at the party.
He’s been practicing pai gow for a while and now knows all the strategies.

sense.definition: a gambling card game, often played in casinos, in which two or more punters play against the banker

examples.x: I tried my luck at the casino last night and played a few rounds of baccarat.
After dinner, we watched a baccarat game being played on the casino floor.
I’ve heard that baccarat is one of the easiest games to learn at a casino.
He won a few hands of baccarat and left the casino with a decent profit.

sense.definition: a popular casino dice game in which players place bets on the outcome of the roll of two dice, with various betting options available for different combinations and totals
a traditional Chinese dice game played with three dice, where players bet on various possible outcomes of the dice roll
a lottery-style gambling game in which players select numbers from a predetermined range, and winning numbers are drawn randomly to determine the winners

examples.x: I was excited when I matched five numbers in keno, but it wasn’t enough to win the jackpot.

sense.definition: a game of chance played with randomly drawn numbers, where players match the numbers on their cards to form specific patterns, often with the objective of calling out "Bingo!" to indicate that they have completed a winning arrangement

examples.x: We played bingo at the community center, and it was a fun way to spend the afternoon.
She won a prize in the bingo game by completing a straight line of numbers on her card.
Playing bingo is a great way to practice listening skills while having fun with friends.
At the fair, we found a bingo booth where players could win small stuffed animals.

sense.definition: a type of gambling machine that allows players to bet on the outcome of a random spinning of symbols or reels

examples.x: I tried my luck at the casino and played a slot machine for a few hours.
She won a small jackpot on the slot machine, which made her night.
After losing at the table games, he decided to try his hand at a slot machine.
We walked around the casino, checking out all the different types of slot machines.
I put a dollar in the slot machine and spun the reels, hoping for a big win.

sense.definition: a game of chance where tickets with numbers or symbols are purchased, and a random selection of numbers or symbols determines the winners

examples.x: She bought a ticket for the state lottery in hopes of winning the jackpot.
The lottery draw will take place on Saturday night.
Winning the lottery allowed him to pay off his debts and travel the world.
They hold a weekly lottery with cash prizes for lucky winners.
Playing the lottery is a popular pastime, despite the low odds of winning.

sense.definition: a competition where people buy tickets for a chance to win a prize, with the winner selected randomly

examples.x: She won a bike in the school raffle.
They organized a raffle to raise money for charity.
He bought three tickets for the raffle.
The raffle prize was a holiday trip.
A raffle is a fun way to fundraise for the community.

sense.definition: a dice game that uses five special dice with poker card faces on them, and the objective is to roll the best poker hand possible

examples.x: We played a few rounds of poker dice after dinner last night.
He got a full house in poker dice, which made him the winner of the round.
She kept rolling her poker dice, hoping for a royal flush.
I bought a set of poker dice for our next game night.
She rolled three Aces in poker dice and won the round easily.

sense.definition: a dice game typically played with three six-sided dice, where players bet on different combinations and try to roll specific winning combinations to win the round

examples.x: They decided to play Cee-lo during the lunch break to pass the time.
Cee-lo is often played at family gatherings for some lighthearted fun.
He explained the rules of Cee-lo to his friends before starting the game.
They used three dice from the board game to play a quick round of Cee-lo.
Playing Cee-lo with friends is a fun way to spend a quiet afternoon.

sense.definition: a bluffing dice game where players roll dice and make bids on the total number of dice showing a particular face value, with players trying to outbid each other and detect if someone is lying about the dice they have
a popular dice game where players roll five dice to form various combinations and earn points, aiming to score the highest possible total in each category and achieve the maximum score

examples.x: The family spent the evening playing Yahtzee together and competing for the highest score.
She rolled five sixes on her first turn, winning the game with a Yahtzee.
During the party, everyone gathered around the table to play a few rounds of Yahtzee.
They brought a Yahtzee set to the cabin for a weekend of games and relaxation.

sense.definition: a dice game played with six dice, where players aim to score points by rolling certain combinations, and the objective is to reach a target score while avoiding rolling Farkles

examples.x: After dinner, we all sat around the table to play a few rounds of Farkle.
Farkle is one of my favorite games to bring on family trips because everyone enjoys it.
To win the game, you need both good luck and smart decisions when playing Farkle.
During the weekend, we taught our friends how to play Farkle, and they quickly got hooked.
My dad scored 2,000 points in one turn during Farkle, which shocked everyone.

sense.definition: a social dice game typically played in large groups, involving rolling dice and trying to score points by matching specific numbers
